name: smartoption-mcp
summary: MCP server exposing the smartoption-ai customer + admin APIs (copy-trading, agent ops, signal history, data center, quant strategy R&D, admin self-deploy platform, cloud-broker onboarding + manual trade) as tools for AI agents (Claude Desktop / Claude Code / any MCP client). Bundles the develop-quant-strategy Claude Code skill for one-command install.
